Name: CodeSystemContentMode
Title: CodeSystemContentMode
Description: The extent of the content of the code system (the concepts and codes it defines) are represented in a code system resource.

Name: CodeSystemHierarchyMeaning
Title: CodeSystemHierarchyMeaning
Description: The meaning of the hierarchy of concepts in a code system.

Name: PropertyType
Title: PropertyType
Description: The type of a property value.

Name: DesignationUse
Title: Designation Use
Description: Details of how a designation would be used

Name: FilterOperator
Title: FilterOperator
Description: The kind of operation to perform as a part of a property based filter.

Name: Jurisdiction ValueSet
Title: Jurisdiction
Description: This value set defines a base set of codes for country, country subdivision and region    for indicating where a resource is intended to be used.             Note: The codes for countries and country subdivisions are taken from    [ISO 3166](https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html)    while the codes for "supra-national" regions are from    [UN Standard country or area codes for statistical use (M49)](http://unstats.un.org/unsd/methods/m49/m49.htm).

Name: CommonLanguages
Title: Common Languages
Description: This value set includes common codes from BCP-47 (http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

Name: PublicationStatus
Title: PublicationStatus
Description: The lifecycle status of an artifact.

Name: VSRuimPropertyCodes
Title: RUIM - ValueSet des codes de propriétés médicament
Description: ValueSet regroupant les codes de propriétés définis pour le référentiel RUIM. Utilisé pour contraindre l'élément `property.code` dans le profil du CodeSystem RUIM.
